name: 03 - Eval Quality
description: Quality dashboards: eval-score distribution by model and provider over time. Reads from the eval_scores table (Postgres control plane) joined with gateway_traces (ClickHouse) via virtual_key / replica lookup where applicable.

native.query: SELECT id, provider, created_at FROM model_catalog ORDER BY provider, id
SELECT s.metric, round(avg(s.score)::numeric, 3) AS avg_score, count() AS samples FROM eval_scores s WHERE s.scored_at >= now() - INTERVAL '7 days' GROUP BY s.metric ORDER BY s.metric
SELECT u.email, u.role, u.created_at FROM users u ORDER BY u.created_at DESC LIMIT 50
